finding_results.notes: Replaced the abstract close with on-arrival father-daughter dialogue and immediate penalty sprints, including visible physical/social consequence before chapter end.
Added an explicit midday decision (Anika tells Zoe not to ask about home/training at school) and referenced it in the later locker confrontation to create direct causality.

summary: All required structural/craft findings were addressed: the middle third now contains a decision-dependent causal turn, and the chapter close now dramatizes immediate consequence in-scene instead of cutting to abstraction.
